message:
Running command: # The script regex didn't match - let me check why. The issue is \bamuxbus_[ab]\b
# but port names are like clk_amuxbus_a (amuxbus_ is in the middle)
# Need to fix the pattern
python3 -c "
import re
line = '    inout clk_amuxbus_a,'
print(bool(re.search(r'\bamuxbus_[ab]\b', line)))  # Checking old pattern
print(bool(re.search(r'amuxbus_[ab]', line)))  # simpler pattern
"
